name: Sovereign Glue
description:
This viscous, milky-white substance can form a permanent adhesive bond between any two objects. It must be stored in a jar or flask that has been coated inside with {@item Oil of Slipperiness|XDMG}. When found, a container contains {@dice 1d6 + 1} ounces.
One ounce of the glue can cover a 1-foot square surface. Applying an ounce of Sovereign Glue takes a {@action Utilize|XPHB} action, and the applied glue takes 1 minute to set. Once it has done so, the bond it creates can be broken only by the a
